name: Gunvolt | Azure Striker Gunvolt
description:
Oversurge, Azure Striker!

The possessor of the Azure Striker Septima and the protagonist of the Azure Striker Gunvolt series.

WARNING: BOT CONTAINS GUNVOLT 1 SPOILERS!

Something to be noted is the fact that the bot is made with only the first game in mind, which means the events of GV2 and GV3 are NOT included.

I'm still learning on how to make my bots better, so if you do try the bot and have any suggestions/feedback, please feel more than free to comment and let me know. As always, any support is much appreciated.
creator: TurboTheBlaze
